name: John Locke
bio: Christian Akulugu is an results-driven Business Development Officer at Atlas Rent A Car in Ghana. He specializes in identifying growth opportunities, managing corporate accounts, and delivering tailored mobility solutions. Known for his strong networking skills and market insight, Christian focuses on building long-term client relationships to expand Atlas's footprint in the transport sector.
